title: Astronia parviflora
taxonomy: Astronia parviflora is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. This family is commonly known as the melastome or memecylid family, which consists of around 170 genera and over 5,000 species. The Melastomataceae family is native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world, with a significant presence in Asia and the Americas. Astronia parviflora is a member of the genus Astronia, which contains several species of flowering plants. The classification of Astronia parviflora is further detailed in the botanical classification system, with its full classification being Astronia parviflora, family Melastomataceae, order Myrtales, class Magnoliopsida, and kingdom Plantae.
